capabilities.notes: Native pandapower CGMES/CIM import is wrapped for balanced models, and balanced export is validated by re-importing the generated CGMES package through pandapower. Current export scope is the supported bus-branch subset with one slack source, lines, and constant-power loads.
Balanced MATPOWER cases are validated. Unbalanced semantics are outside the MATPOWER exchange contract.
OpenDSS is validated as both an import and export backend for the current balanced and starter three-phase distribution subsets.
Balanced JSON and native pandapower 3ph models are supported. Unbalanced validation currently targets native pandapower roundtrips.
Experimental OpenDSS-focused phase-split pandapower export path. It preserves per-phase buses and standard pandapower ZIP/current loads without modifying the existing pandapower route.
Balanced PowerModels MATPOWER-compatible import and JSON export are validated with Julia AC power flow, including package-native pm.jl test-network routes.

Validated for the current DSS-compatible unbalanced subset. Import uses the OpenDSS parser on PowerModelsDistribution-compatible DSS inputs, and export/validation are signed off for native asymmetric-load feeders within the current supported subset.
Balanced MATPOWER-compatible import/export route targeting PowerSystems.jl with validation via PowerSimulations.jl AC power flow.

Balanced PYPOWER-style Python case import is supported. Validation currently targets static network import into pandapower for the signed-off balanced subset, including transformer branches represented through the imported branch data.

Balanced AC PyPSA import/export is validated for the current line-based transmission subset against pandapower and PyPSA power flow. Current scope excludes unbalanced networks and does not yet sign off transformer-, shunt-, link-, store-, or storage-unit-heavy PyPSA models.

Official MATPOWER case9 imported through pandapower converter.
Balanced export validated with Julia PowerModels AC power flow.
Skipped strict bilateral validation for DTU7K subnet 26 because one side did not converge: newtonpf() missing 1 required positional argument: 'options'.
Official pandapower SmallGrid CGMES sample imported through pandapower's native CGMES loader.
Official CGMES sample exported onward to PowerModels and validated with Julia AC power flow.
Validated against OpenDSS source slack power and bus voltages for the currently supported subset.
Balanced-equivalent export validated with Julia PowerModels AC power flow.
Balanced pandapower re-import of the OpenDSS starter feeder exported back to OpenDSS and validated against pandapower AC power flow.
Transformer-free balanced pandapower subset exported to CGMES and validated by native pandapower CGMES re-import.
Unbalanced OpenDSS starter feeder validated against source node voltages with pandapower runpp_3ph.
Unbalanced OpenDSS starter feeder exported to PowerModelsDistribution and validated against source node voltages.
Pandapower JSON re-import generated from the validated MATPOWER case9 route.
Balanced pandapower JSON export validated with Julia PowerModels AC power flow.
Balanced line-based pandapower model exported to PyPSA NetCDF and validated against pandapower AC power flow.
PyPSA NetCDF re-import validated against PyPSA AC power flow and converted back through pandapower for the current line-based balanced subset.
Native pandapower 3-phase roundtrip validated with runpp_3ph.
Native pandapower 3-phase model exported to OpenDSS and validated against runpp_3ph node voltages.
Native pandapower 3-phase model exported to PowerModelsDistribution and validated against runpp_3ph node voltages.
OpenDSS native chained feeder with two loads validated against source bus voltages through pandapower.
OpenDSS native branched unbalanced feeder validated against source node voltages through pandapower.
OpenDSS native branched unbalanced feeder validated against source node voltages through PowerModelsDistribution.
Pandapower package case4gs validated through PyPSA on the supported balanced AC subset.
Pandapower package case5 validated through PyPSA on the supported balanced AC subset.
Pandapower package case6ww validated with Julia PowerModels AC power flow.
Pandapower package Baran-Wu 33-bus feeder validated with Julia PowerModels AC power flow.
Native PyPSA meshed triangle with one slack, one PV generator, and two loads validated against PyPSA AC power flow through pandapower.
Native PyPSA radial transmission-style case validated against PyPSA AC power flow through pandapower.
Native PyPSA five-bus ring with distributed load validated against PyPSA AC power flow through pandapower.
pm.jl package-native MATPOWER case30 imported into pandapower and validated against deterministic pandapower AC power flow.
pm.jl package-native MATPOWER case30 imported to canonical, exported back to PowerModels JSON, and validated with Julia PowerModels AC power flow.
MATPOWER case30 imported to canonical, exported through the PowerSystems.jl route, and validated with PowerSimulations.jl AC power flow.
